since_last: 36% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.11%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC +0.83% · Gold -0.24% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 36% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.11%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.11%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +13.68%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +13.68%, META +5.91%, NVDA +3.95%, UEC +3.84%, NXE +3.16%. Laggards: OKTA -7.11%, CRWD -5.67%, MDB -5.61%, ZS -5.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.19% at $145.78
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
